case_title: SHEPHERD RONALD VS LEBERMAN ROBERT ESQ/ SIDEMAN & BANCROFT

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEBERMAN ROBERT ESQ/ SIDEMAN & BANCROFT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SHEPHERD RONALD AS TO DEFENDANT LEBERMAN ROBERT ESQ/ SIDEMAN & BANCROFT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHEPHERD RONALD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEBERMAN ROBERT ESQ/ SIDEMAN & BANCROFT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
